hint: Story-related and unmissable. Unlocks at the very beginning of the game when you set out on your journey.
Story-related and unmissable. Unlocks naturally as you progress through the Spring Meadows chapter.
Story-related and unmissable. Unlocks naturally as you finish the Flying Waters section of the map.
Story-related and unmissable. Unlocks upon concluding the events at the Ancient Sanctuary.

description: Reach or complete the Gestral Village.
hint: Story-related and unmissable. Unlocks naturally when progressing through the Gestral Village.
Story-related and unmissable. Unlocks naturally during the main campaign when finishing Esquie's Nest.
Story-related and unmissable. Unlocks upon progressing past the Stone Wave Cliffs region.
Story-related and unmissable. Unlocks naturally as you traverse the Forgotten Battlefield.

description: Complete the events at Monoco's Station.
hint: Story-related and unmissable. You will earn this after completing the primary objectives at Monoco's Station.
Story-related and unmissable. Unlocks when the main story takes you through the ruins of Old Lumière.
Story-related and unmissable. Unlocks after clearing the First Axon.
Story-related and unmissable. Unlocks after clearing the Second Axon.
Story-related and unmissable. Unlocks as you progress into the late game and reach the Monolith.
Story-related and unmissable. Unlocks after winning the climactic boss battle against the Paintress.
Story-related and unmissable. Unlocks upon your eventual return to Lumière near the conclusion of the story.
Story-related and unmissable. Unlocks after finishing the final chapter and watching the end credits.
You will need to acquire all traversal forms (Plane, Train, Submarine) to fully explore the game's world. Check for side activities and explore thoroughly to find them.

description: Find all of the journals from prior expeditions.
hint: Journals are hidden collectibles scattered throughout the world left by Expeditions 1 to 32. Make sure to thoroughly check every corner of the map.
Speak to Nevron whenever available at camp or in the world and complete their entire chain of side quests.
Follow and finish all side objectives and personal quests related to Simon.
Visit the Gestral Beach area and successfully complete the mini-games or challenges offered there.
Interact with Clea whenever possible and follow her specific questline to completion.
The Endless Tower is an endgame combat gauntlet. Prepare your team with high-level gear and abilities before attempting to clear it.

description: Find and rescue all Lost Gestrals.
hint: Lost Gestrals are hidden throughout the various regions. Explore off the beaten path to find and return them.
Complete the puzzle or boss encounter tied to the Serpenphare. Make sure you are well-leveled before engaging.
Defeat the optional boss/enemy known as Sprong. Ensure your party is fully upgraded before the fight.
Locate the Painting Workshop and finish the puzzle or side quest tied to 'Noir et Blanc' to unlock this.

description: Max out your relationship bond with Sciel.
hint: Talk to Sciel frequently at camps, choose favorable dialogue options, and complete their personal quests to maximize your bond.

description: Max out your relationship bond with Monoco.
hint: Interact with Monoco during rest phases at camp, select positive dialogue, and finish her companion quests.

description: Max out your relationship bond with Maelle.
hint: Spend time with Maelle at camps, prioritize dialogue choices that align with her views, and complete her side missions.

description: Max out your relationship bond with Lune.
hint: Consistently check in with Lune at rest camps, choose supportive dialogue, and see his personal story to the end.

description: Max out your relationship bond with Esquie.
hint: Interact with Esquie throughout your journey and fulfill their specific companion requests to reach the highest relationship level.
Take the necessary materials to a blacksmith or crafting menu and apply the first upgrade to any character's weapon.
Gather the required late-game materials and upgrade a single weapon to its maximum possible level.
Lumina points are earned as you progress. Spend your very first point in the skill tree to unlock this.
Gain experience by winning battles and completing quests. Level 33 is a key milestone for the Expedition.
Continue battling enemies and clearing side content to amass enough experience to hit level 66.
Level 99 is the level cap. You will likely need to grind in endgame areas such as the Endless Tower to achieve this.

description: With Gustave, use a fully charged Overcharge that Breaks an enemy.
hint: During combat, charge Gustave's Overcharge attack to the maximum tier and unleash it on an enemy whose Break gauge is nearly full to shatter their guard.
Use Lune in combat to seamlessly apply his unique Stains onto an enemy without dropping the combo, triggering a Perfect Flow.
During battle, effectively switch between Maelle's different combat stances to chain attacks and achieve maximum synergy.

description: Maximize the damage of Sciel's Foretell ability.
hint: Activate Sciel's Foretell skill and fulfill the exact combat conditions it requires to unleash its highest possible damage output.
In real-time combat, press the defensive/dodge button with perfect timing just as an enemy attack is about to hit to perform a perfect Verso.
Use Monoco's roulette/wheel skill in battle and successfully time your input to land on the optimal outcome.
Perfectly time your execution of a Pétanque-style attack so that your projectile exactly replaces the target's position.
Fully unlock Monoco's skill tree or gather all of her specific ability collectibles hidden across the world.
Continue progressing through the main campaign. Every playable party member will eventually join your expedition automatically.
During battle, build your party's Gradient meter up to Level 3, then unleash this powerful ultimate team attack.
Music records are hidden collectibles. You can find them in chests, buy them from merchants, or earn them as quest rewards. Explore thoroughly to collect all 33.
Locate a Paint Cage in the open world and use your attacks or abilities to shatter it.
Target an enemy's specific weaknesses in combat to fill their stagger gauge until their guard breaks.

description: Defeat a boss without taking any damage.
hint: Master your real-time dodging and parrying (Verso) mechanics. This is easiest to achieve against an early-game boss if you return later while over-leveled.

description: Witness an optional scene at camp.
hint: Rest frequently at camps and interact with party members who have dialogue prompts above their heads to trigger an optional bonding scene.
Progress through the storyline or complete the specific side objective required to unlock Esquie for your journey.
Locate the hidden Mime enemy while exploring the Lumière area and successfully defeat them in combat.
